form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months won by 5 len at this track March 20 over 1200m defeating Boryeong Ultra Man carrying 53kg at $6.80. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on February 16 2025 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Doctor Castle with 56kg at $7.50. The one to beat based on that latest effort. Improver with winning prospects.
